description: Style Note Flattering your figure while keeping you airy and comfortable, this only tank top is a must have casual option. The lace detailing gives it a feminine touch. You can wear it with a light coloured pair of pants or capris and a comfortable pair of flip flops to get set for a casual day out.  Product Details Black tank top, has short sleeves, round neckline and lace detailing in front  Material and Care 100% viscose Machine wash cool with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Use cool ironSize and Fit  Black tank top, has short sleeves, round neckline and lace detailing in front
